name: adj-clean-fabricated-disproof
note: the model tries to CLEAR an absence claim with a disproof that is NOT verbatim in the evidence it was shown. The disproof-anchor gate rejects it, so it abstains to needs_review, never a pass on the model's bare say-so (C-092). PRECISION on the clearance side.
